name: Neural spike
description: Overload a target's nervous system. Test Presence DR12 — on success, target is stunned for one round.

name: Ghost protocol
description: Render yourself invisible to cameras and electronic detection for d4 rounds.

name: Viral cascade
description: Crash one electronic system within range. Locks down doors, disables turrets, kills comms.

name: Nano-heal
description: Swarm of nanites repairs d6 HP. Cannot be used on androids.

name: Data leech
description: Siphon encrypted data from a connected target. Reveals one secret or access code.

name: Static burst
description: Emit an EMP that disrupts all electronics in the immediate area for one round. Affects allies.

name: Perception filter
description: Allies cannot be detected by electronic sensors for one scene.

name: Swarm construct
description: Nanite swarm attacks one target for d8 damage, ignoring armor.

name: Memory wipe
description: Erase the last minute of a target's memory. Test Presence DR14 to affect unwilling targets.

name: Overclock
description: Boost one ally's next test, granting +4 to the roll.
